input_dict.question: NFL Street 3 is the third installment of the "NFL Street" series, which  American football wide receiver, was an official spokesperson of the game?
input_dict.source_summary: The official spokesperson was Chad Johnson (formerly known as Chad Ochocinco), the American football wide receiver.
input_dict.target_summary: Summary1 identified Chad Johnson. Chad Javon Johnson (born January 9, 1978), formerly Chad Ochocinco, is a former American football wide receiver. The NFL Street 3 article states that Chad Johnson of the Cincinnati Bengals appears on the cover and was the official spokesperson of the game.

The NFL Street 3 article states that Chad Johnson of the Cincinnati Bengals appears on the cover and was the official spokesperson of the game.
